objects.name: Frontier Trailhead
objects.description: A weathered signpost marks where the road gives out. Beyond the gate, open frontier rolls to the horizon.

attrs.cell_name:
kinds = ['Windswept Meadow', 'Pine Forest', 'Rocky Scree', 'Creek Crossing']
result = kinds[(x * 7 + y * 13) % 4]
attrs.cell_desc:
descs = ['Knee-high grass bends under a steady wind.', 'Pines crowd close; the light falls in narrow blades.', 'Loose rock shifts underfoot between stubborn thistles.', 'A cold creek chatters over smooth stones.']
result = descs[(x * 7 + y * 13) % 4] + ' [' + str(x) + ', ' + str(y) + ']'
attrs.cell_exits:
exits = ['north', 'south', 'east', 'west']
if x == 10 and y == 10:
    exits = exits + [{'name': 'trailhead', 'destination': '78a4e66b-aa6e-4da4-990e-6709e8f1974c', 'aliases': ['out']}]
result = exits
attrs.edge_msg: The frontier ends in an impassable wall of bramble.
